description: Refactor the single-module Maven project 'petclinic-mono' at ~/IdeaProjects/petclinic-mono into a multi-module project consisting of a parent POM and three child modules: 'petclinic-model', 'petclinic-service', and 'petclinic-app'. The 'petclinic-model' module must contain the 'com.petclinic.model' and 'com.petclinic.util' packages. The 'petclinic-service' module must contain the 'com.petclinic.service' package and depend on 'petclinic-model'. The 'petclinic-app' module must contain the 'com.petclinic.app' package and depend on both 'petclinic-model' and 'petclinic-service'. The final project must compile and package successfully using 'mvn clean package'.
